title: subversion bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[1.14.1-7]
- mod_dav_svn: add conflicts to ensure compatible mod_dav
  Related: RHEL-79948

[1.14.1-6]
- mod_dav_svn: inherit DavBasePath from httpd
  Resolves: RHEL-79948
